description: Create a two-column content slide on the EU-Mercosur Agreement with explanatory text on the left and a large illustrative photo on the right.

header.headline: EU-Mercosur Agreement: A milestone for the European agri-food sector

items.text: The EU-Mercosur trade agreement is a landmark deal between the EU and Mercosur countries aimed at reducing tariffs, facilitating trade and strengthening economic ties.
Especially for the agri-food sector, the agreement offers substantial benefits including expanded market access, lower export costs and enhanced competitiveness for EU producers in South America.
At the same time, the agreement includes safeguards such as tariff-rate quotas and sanitary standards to protect sensitive sectors and ensure fair competition.
By opening one of the world's largest trading blocs to European agriculture, the agreement is expected to create significant export opportunities and support long-term sector growth.

right.body: Illustrative photo of a modern institutional building facade.
